title: Vikram-1: India's Orbital Rocket Success!

scenes.text: India just launched its first privately developed rocket into orbit!
Vikram-1 achieved orbit on its very first attempt, a major milestone for India.
This success is a game changer for India's growing space industry.
A new era of private exploration begins!
scenes.label: NEW ERA OF SPACE!

scenes.text: Follow if curiosity runs your brain.

description: India's Vikram-1 rocket achieves orbit on its first launch, marking a turning point for private space endeavors. Follow for daily science!
